# Real-Time Chat Application - Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify project structure created
- [x] Backend files created (Express + Socket.io)
- [x] Frontend files created (React)
- [x] Configuration files created (.env.example)
- [ ] Install backend dependencies
- [ ] Install frontend dependencies
- [ ] Configure environment variables
- [ ] Test backend server
- [ ] Test frontend application
- [ ] Verify Socket.io real-time communication
- [ ] Test all features

## Quick Start Commands

### Backend
```bash
cd backend
npm install
cp .env.example .env
npm run dev
```

### Frontend
```bash
cd frontend
npm install
cp .env.example .env
npm start
```

## Project Overview

This is a complete real-time chat application with:
- **Backend**: Node.js + Express + Socket.io
- **Frontend**: React with Socket.io client
- **Features**: Real-time messaging, online users, typing indicators, message history
- **Architecture**: Clean, layered, production-ready

See README.md in project root for full documentation.
